title: The fate of the Sm fold under genome reduction: a structure-informed phylogeny across the three domains of life
description: Analysis code and derived data for an integrated study of the Sm/Lsm/Hfq superfamily: a structure-guided three-domain phylogeny, a dual-method bacterial Hfq phylogeny, a completeness-controlled census of Hfq loss across bacterial lifestyles, and a structurally-verified census of Sm-fold retention in DPANN/Asgard archaea versus loss in the bacterial CPR radiation. Consolidates the earlier Hfq (bio-a) and Sm/Lsm (bio-b) analyses.
